questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an architecture management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has an architecture management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise architecture management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the architecture management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the architecture management service is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Architecture Management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs for architecture management are formalized and documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for architecture management

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Architecture Management reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether architecture management KPIs and KRIs are reviewed frequently.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent KPI/KRI review

capability_questions.capability_name: Network Segmentation based on least function principle

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy network segmentation based on an existing segmentation strategy or industry standards?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network segmentation follows a documented strategy or industry standards.
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmentation strategy or industry standards

questions.prompt: Is network segmentation deployed enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network segmentation is deployed enterprise-wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide network segmentation deployment

questions.prompt: Is network segmentation automated or performed manually based on functional requirement?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network segmentation is automated or performed manually based on functional requirements.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated or manual segmentation by functional requirement

questions.prompt: Is the network segmentation reviewed frequently to enhance security?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network segmentation is reviewed frequently to enhance security.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent segmentation review for security enhancement

questions.prompt: Are the staging, development and deployment segments separated physically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether staging, development, and deployment segments are physically separated.
questions.evaluation_focus: Physical separation of staging, development, and deployment segments

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy application segmentation based on an existing segmentation strategy or industry standards?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application segmentation follows a documented strategy or industry standards.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application segmentation strategy or industry standards

questions.prompt: Is application segmentation deployed enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application segmentation is deployed enterprise-wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide application segmentation deployment

questions.prompt: Is application segmentation automated or performed manually based on functional requirement?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application segmentation is automated or performed manually based on functional requirements.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated or manual application segmentation by functional requirement

questions.prompt: Is the application segmentation reviewed frequently to enhance security?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application segmentation is reviewed frequently to enhance security.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent application segmentation review for security enhancement

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have capability to encrypt data in motion between the various segments enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise encrypts data in motion between segments enterprise-wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Data in motion encryption enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Does the cryptographic solution provide the enterprise with cryptographic agility?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the cryptographic solution provides cryptographic agility.
questions.evaluation_focus: Cryptographic agility

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy active/active network such that failure of one availability zone does not impact the other?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise deploys active/active network architecture across availability zones.
questions.evaluation_focus: Active/active network across availability zones

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have at least 2 availability zones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has at least two availability zones.
questions.evaluation_focus: At least two availability zones

questions.prompt: Can the network react and provide an alternate path to workload thus reducing impact to end user and application?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the network can provide alternate paths to workloads during failure.
questions.evaluation_focus: Alternate path failover for workloads

questions.prompt: Are single point of failure analysis performed to make sure that there are no unforeseen failures in the network?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether single point of failure analysis is performed for the network.
questions.evaluation_focus: Single point of failure analysis

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for design reviews?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has a formalized documented process for design reviews.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented design review process

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy technology that can support secure API communications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise deploys technology that supports secure API communications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Technology supporting secure API communications

questions.prompt: Are all functional segments and applications deployed to support secure communications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether functional segments and applications are deployed to support secure communications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure communications across functional segments and applications

questions.prompt: Are communications between applications monitored and reviewed to make sure that communication is secure?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether inter-application communications are monitored and reviewed for security.
questions.evaluation_focus: Monitoring and review of inter-application communications

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy specific function based network security controls across the enterprise functional segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether function-based network security controls are deployed across enterprise functional segments.
questions.evaluation_focus: Function-based network security controls across segments

questions.prompt: Are the network security controls reviewed frequently to measure efficacy and enhance security posture?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network security controls are reviewed frequently for efficacy and posture improvement.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent network security control efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have capability to securely move workload from on prem to cloud segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise can securely migrate workloads from on-premises to cloud segments.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure on-premises to cloud workload migration

questions.prompt: Can cloud migration take place across all locations in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cloud migration can take place across all enterprise locations.
questions.evaluation_focus: Cloud migration across all enterprise locations

questions.prompt: Does the cloud platform possess capability to automate cloud migration from on premise segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the cloud platform can automate migration from on-premises segments.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated cloud migration from on-premises segments

questions.prompt: Are cloud migration processes frequently reviewed for efficacy of secure transmissions and user experience?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cloud migration processes are frequently reviewed for secure transmissions and user experience.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent cloud migration process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a separate team that manages and tracks architectural changes across the enterprise and measures the risk of threats and reviews relevant architectural upgrades?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated AMO team manages architectural changes, measures threat risk, and reviews architectural upgrades.
questions.evaluation_focus: Dedicated AMO team for architectural change management
